hero.title: UNSHAKEN
hero.paragraph: A premier leadership and wellness summit uniquely tailored for Canadian newcomer youth. Gain keys to growth, navigate your landscape, and find your family.
hero.image_caption: A generation connected. Rooted in community, rising together.

who_we_are.heading: Empowering the Future Builders of Canada
who_we_are.paragraph: We are dedicated to fostering safe spaces of belonging, support, and hope for immigrant and newcomer youth (ages 15–25). We walk alongside them during their transition, preparing them with critical skills to lead and thrive.

pillars.title: Navigate
pillars.description: Understand the Canadian academic, social, and professional systems. Receive key resources and guidelines to traverse relocation transitions.

pillars.title: Grow
pillars.description: Build essential leadership abilities, strengthen psychological confidence, and develop holistic mental wellness under expert guidance.

pillars.title: Give Back
pillars.description: Transform from a participant into a community pillars. Lead peer groups, speak, share your journey, and empower newer arrivals.

items.title: Safe Community Space
items.description: Connect with peer youths facing identical cultural integration journeys. Real isolation-breaking experiences.

items.title: Custom Care & Wellness
items.description: Access tailored psychological mental wellbeing programs and counselor circles equipped for immigrant realities.

items.title: Leadership Accolades
items.description: Earn practical capabilities, run localized events, coordinate tasks, and scale confidence structures.

items.title: Impact Partnerships
items.description: Link with organizations, potential mentors, education pathways, and Canadian corporate career systems.

get_involved.heading: Four Ways to Connect With Our Mission

items.title: Join Community
items.description: Become part of a safe, welcoming space of immigrant youth. Build deep friendships, share stories, and grow together.

items.title: Become a Mentor
items.description: Guide a newcomer youth through their academic, career, and personal transition in Canada. Share your wisdom and build a legacy.

items.title: Volunteer
items.description: Support our events, workshops, and wellness circles. Your time and energy can create directly tangible differences in young lives.

items.title: Partner With Us
items.description: Collaborate with us as a corporate sponsor, school, or community organization to provide pathways and systemic support.
